title: First Live Mission Cell Proof V1
summary: Use one real mission cell on a bounded internal self-improvement target so DGDH proves launch, live proof, hardening, and promotion on the same path.

charter.objective: Run one real mission cell on a bounded self-improvement target around long-autonomy continuity, survive the first real friction, harden that friction once, and leave durable truth that makes the next run easier to carry.
charter.primaryMetric: A mission launched from `missionCell: first-live-mission-cell-proof-v1` completes launch, live proof, at least one proof-discovered hardening cut, and one promotion step without David restating the lane mid-run.
guardMetrics: No first-green closure is mistaken for mission completion.
No unrelated platform or provider expansion is opened.
No Type-1 boundary is crossed without escalation.
charter.budget: One long autonomous branch-sized mission with multiple coherent sister cuts and midpoint commits allowed.
charter.runtime: A single live proof container that may span compacts, context loss, and several pushed branch states.
allowedZones: prompt, issue, wakeup, and portability seams
targeted tests and bounded runtime proof

type2Autonomy: bounded branch edits inside the stated blast radius
compact-safe mission continuity and mission-state truth improvements
targeted replay, eval, portability, CLI, or runtime bridge cuts that stay reversible
type1Escalations: main branch mutation outside reviewed merge flow
global policy changes beyond this mission cell
escalationPath: stop at the boundary instead of guessing
state the exact action and why it is Type-1
escalate to David or the Oberreviewer gate with concrete evidence

oberreviewerTriggers: the mission widens beyond continuity and live-proof hardening
promotion would affect default behavior without enough replay or runtime truth
the same friction repeats and suggests the mission cell was cut badly
requiredEvidence: targeted tests, replay truth, or runtime proof
the smallest truthful statement of the current blocker or promotion claim
stopReasons: remaining work has widened into a new program

replayChecks: the mission cell starts from repo truth instead of chat reconstruction
the live run preserves mission-state truth across at least one major transition
the proof-discovered hardening cut measurably reduces the same friction path
guardChecks: launch, live proof, hardening, and promotion remain distinct phases
the mission does not collapse into first-green closure
promotion still requires durable value instead of narrative activity
successSignals: one live mission-cell run completes more than one phase
at least one hardening cut exists only because the live proof exposed it
the next run would require less David restating than before

defaultTargets: the minimal runtime seam that now carries the truth durably
promoteWhen: the next run can start with less chat restatement
the same friction is less likely to recur on the same path
launch, hardening, and promotion truth are reviewable from repo and run evidence
stayExperimentalWhen: the gain only worked in one local moment
the result is mostly narrative without runtime or git proof
future runs still depend on fragile human retelling
demoteWhen: the mission-state truth becomes stale or misleading
the new lane creates more supervision load than it removes
the proof cannot be replayed or honestly reconstructed

firmBound: the rule that proof-discovered hardening must land before completion
carrierBound: current CLI and portability loading path

starterPath.trigger: Create or update a bounded internal self-improvement issue with `missionCell: first-live-mission-cell-proof-v1` and a clear live-proof target around long-autonomy continuity.
issueTemplate: doneWhen: <launch + live proof + hardening + promotion condition>
startupSequence: Validate the mission cell contract with `paperclipai mission cell validate`.
Reference the mission cell directly in the issue packet.
Confirm the live-proof target is narrower than a platform rewrite.
Carry launch and live proof before deciding whether the mission is really open.
After the first real friction, land one proof-discovered hardening cut.
Promote durable truth before calling the mission complete.
firstProbe: Read prompt or wakeup context and confirm the live-proof mission-cell brief is present.
Check that the mission still names launch, live proof, hardening, and promotion as distinct phases.
Run the smallest test, replay, or runtime proof that validates the first changed continuity seam.
